## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] UI/UX update (visual or interaction changes)
- [ ] Telemetry (no customer facing functional changes)
- [ ] Refactor/Optimization (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update (including switching to a new dependant microservice, e.g. Chatterbox -> Qwen)
- [ ] Infrastructure changes (e.g. Terraform)
- [ ] CI/CD or build configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] For all related projects, I have rebased on latest main branch and rebuilt images as needed
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] No new console warnings or errors
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] All related charts/images pushed to production GAR channels
